evaluation_task: coding-task-workflow Phase 10 verification step 1 subagent delegation
test_scenario: Phase 10 starts with test-commands.yaml listing npm test, npm run lint, npm run typecheck, npm run build
step_1_mandate: ALWAYS launches verification subagents; primary agent does NOT directly run commands
verification_subagent_purpose: Execute verification commands and report structured results; primary agent consolidates

parallelism_rules.when_repo_supports_concurrent_execution: Run independent checks in parallel subagents
parallelism_rules.when_repo_does_not_support_concurrent: Run one verification subagent at a time sequentially
parallelism_rules.dependency: npm test may depend on npm run build artifacts

subagent_required_reports.field_1_command: Exact command executed (e.g., npm run lint)
subagent_required_reports.field_2_exit_code: Numeric exit code (0 = success, non-zero = failure)
subagent_required_reports.field_3_pass_fail: Binary pass/fail status derived from exit code
subagent_required_reports.field_4_output_summary: Concise summary (e.g., '44 tests passed, 0 failed' or '247 files checked, 0 warnings')
subagent_required_reports.field_5_failure_details: If exit non-zero: file paths, test names, error messages, stack traces
subagent_required_reports.field_6_environment_assumptions: Node version, npm version, runtime requirements, cached vs clean, skipped checks

structure: You are running Phase 10 verification for work item [WORK_ID]
Context: acceptance criteria, plan guidance, review issue, changed files
Return: command, exit code, pass/fail, output summary, failure details, environment assumptions

npm_run_lint.output_summary: All 247 files passed linting; 0 new warnings

npm_run_build.output_summary: Build successful; 3 bundles generated, 2.4 MB total

npm_test.environment_assumptions: Build artifacts from npm run build required; ran after build completed

primary_agent_consolidation.checks_acceptance_criteria: Maps each criterion from intake issue to subagent evidence
primary_agent_consolidation.verifies_review_clearance: Confirms no High severity issues remain open from Phase 9
primary_agent_consolidation.must_review_results: Do not rely on subagent summaries alone; inspect test output details

verification_template_format.section_1: Automated Checks table with command, exit code, notes
verification_template_format.section_2: Acceptance Criteria table with # criterion, result, evidence
verification_template_format.section_3: Review Clearance table with review type, High findings, status
verification_template_format.section_4: Limitations section if any checks could not be performed

primary_agent_responsibilities: Do NOT directly run verification commands
Partition commands into independent (parallel) and dependent (sequential) groups
Launch verification subagents for each command/group
Record results in phase:verify GitHub issue
Verify acceptance criteria against subagent evidence
Decide: fail → Phase 8 fixes → re-verify, or pass → close verification → Phase 11
skill_specification_references: SKILL.md:34 (Non-negotiable rule #6: Phase 10 step 1 always runs in verification subagents)
workflow.md:303 (Parallelism: independent checks parallel when safe, dependent sequential)
delegation-rules.md (Phase 10 section: partitioning strategy and agent prompt template)
result_summary: The skill clearly specifies that Phase 10 Step 1 ALWAYS launches verification subagents (never direct execution). Partition commands into independent (parallel: lint, typecheck) and dependent (sequential: build, test) groups based on repo capabilities. Each subagent must report: command, exit code, pass/fail, output summary, failure details, environment assumptions. Primary agent consolidates results into phase:verify issue, verifies acceptance criteria, checks review clearance, and decides pass/fail before Gate F.
key_insights: Phase 10 Step 1 is MANDATORY subagent work; primary agent orchestrates only
Partitioning decision: concurrent if repo supports, sequential if not
Each subagent must report 6 required fields for primary agent review
Primary agent consolidates into structured GitHub issue using template
Acceptance criteria validation is primary agent responsibility
Review clearance verification (no High findings) is primary agent responsibility
Decision logic: all pass → close verification → Phase 11, any fail → Phase 8 → re-verify
